claim_boundary: v6.0.3 derives the sigma quadratic-operator architecture and a finite family of admissible conditional sources. The parent action does not select their couplings, coefficients, physical signature, or a stable phase.

components.boundary: Robin endomorphism from independent boundary potential plus coefficient-locked nonminimal completion
components.collar: only from an independent collar action, not a coordinate rewrite
components.flux: Z_F''(0)F_d^2/(2d!) at fixed f; opposite response after fixed-Q elimination
components.matter: alpha_2 T for parity-even conformal metric, plus separately declared composite operators

domain: H^2(M8) functions obeying Dirichlet, Neumann, or real Robin data on every boundary component
hyperbolicity_condition: Lorentzian G, Z_0>0, and a selected globally hyperbolic branch
inner_product: <f,g>=integral_M dmu_G conjugate(f) g, with positive Euclidean measure
lorentzian_equation_operator: nabla_A(Z_0 nabla^A)-A_0-Xi_total under the recorded conventional Lorentzian action sign; stability requires a selected spatial problem

reduced_diagnostics.collar_mode: one-dimensional Sturm-Liouville operator -d_rho(Z d_rho)+A_eff with endpoint data
reduced_diagnostics.curvature_branch: lambda_n=Z_0 k_n^2+A_0+xi_1 R (+xi_2 L2+xi_3 L3 when declared)
reduced_diagnostics.top_form_fixed_Q: opposite quadratic response after eliminating F at fixed Q
reduced_diagnostics.top_form_fixed_f: add +Z_F'' F_d^2/(2d!) in the recorded Euclidean convention
reduced_diagnostics.trace_branch: lambda_n=Z_0 k_n^2+A_0+alpha_2 T; trace-free T gives no shift

self_adjointness: closed real Robin/Dirichlet/Neumann data make the boundary form vanish; interface transmission data require a matched junction form
